title: Glass Table
description: ITSI glass tables are custom visualizations that let you monitor KPI search results. `glass_table` objects define all widgets and drawing elements that appear in the glass table.

attributes.name: _key
attributes.label: _key
attributes.description: Unique identifier for this glass table.

attributes.name: description
attributes.label: description
attributes.description: User-defined description for this glass table.

attributes.name: latest
attributes.label: latest
attributes.description: Latest time for all of the widget searches on the glass table.

attributes.name: latest_label
attributes.label: latest_label
attributes.description: Latest label displayed in the glass table instant picker. Matches latest attribute.

attributes.name: svg_coordinates
attributes.label: svg_coordinates
attributes.description: x and y viewbox offsets for the glass table.

attributes.name: content
attributes.label: content
attributes.description: Array of JSON structures containing all attributes needed to draw the glass table. See Glass Table Widget Configuration.

attributes.name: is_epoch
attributes.label: is_epoch
attributes.description: True when the glass table uses a custom (non-preset) time, false otherwise.

attributes.name: templateSelectedServiceId
attributes.label: templateSelectedServiceId
attributes.description: The id of the service currently in focus if templatization is enabled.

attributes.name: templateSwappableServiceIds
attributes.label: templateSwappableServiceIds
attributes.description: The array of services available to be swapped to for templatization.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
